articles.title: Score an RTX 5070 prebuilt with a Ryzen 7 7700X & 16 GB of DDR5 for $650 off — Stack these promo codes to save on Skytech Gaming's high-end systems
articles.summary: You don't need to spend upwards of $1,500 to build and RTX 5070 system anymore as Skytech has two great prebuilts ready for you. Whether you're rocking a stealthy black setup or a minimal white one, the Shadow 5 and Archangel 5 are both ready to level it up.
articles.title_zh: 以 $650 的折扣購買 RTX 5070 預組電腦，配備 Ryzen 7 7700X 與 16 GB DDR5 — 堆疊多個促銷代碼在 Skytech Gaming 高端系統上節省費用
articles.summary_zh: Skytech 推出兩款優質預組電腦 Shadow 5 和 Archangel 5，讓你無須花費超過 $1,500 就能擁有 RTX 5070 系統。無論你偏好隱沒的黑色或簡約的白色設計，這兩款都能滿足你的需求。

articles.title: Steam Controller leaked review points to $99 MSRP — more expensive than PS5 and Xbox controllers and Nintendo Joy-Cons
articles.summary: A hardware reviewer accidentally made their review video go live on YouTube before the embargo date, revealing the pricing for the Steam Controller.
articles.title_zh: Steam Controller 洩露評測揭示 $99 定價 — 比 PS5、Xbox 控制器和 Nintendo Joy-Cons 更昂貴
articles.summary_zh: 一位硬體評測者意外在禁令日期前將評測影片發佈到 YouTube 上，揭露了 Steam Controller 的定價。

articles.title: Intel's upcoming Xeon 7 "Diamond Rapids" server CPUs reportedly delayed to 2027 — Next-gen Coral Rapids lineup lands 2028 but can be accelerated, according to new leak
articles.summary: Diamond Rapids, also known as Xeon 7, was supposed to launch later this year, but a new leak from Jaykihn claims the timeline has now moved to 2027. Clearwater Forest, the E-core-only successor to Sierra Forest, is set to release in the first half of this year, while the next-gen Coral Rapids family is reportedly planned for 2028.
articles.title_zh: Intel 即將推出的 Xeon 7「Diamond Rapids」伺服器 CPU 據報延期至 2027 年 — 下一代 Coral Rapids 系列定於 2028 年推出但可加速上市，根據新洩露
articles.summary_zh: 原定於今年晚些時候推出的 Xeon 7（Diamond Rapids）據新洩露消息稱現已延期至 2027 年。E-core 專用的 Clearwater Forest（Sierra Forest 的後繼者）預計將於今年上半年發佈，而下一代 Coral Rapids 系列將於 2028 年推出。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘InnerPulse’ is an in depth, private, and on-device mood tracker
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Mood tracking apps can be really important and useful, whether you want to be more mindful – or if you need to track it for your therapist. That said, lots of apps either charge a subscription, are lacking in depth, or don’t have everything you might need. InnerPulse aims to solve that, while keeping privacy at the center. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用焦點：'InnerPulse' 是一款深度、隱私且本地設備的心情追蹤器
articles.summary_zh: 這是 9to5Mac 每週推薦獨立應用的系列文章。心情追蹤應用可以幫助使用者更加正念或了解自己的情緒狀態。

articles.title: Apple Vision Pro suffered from indecisive leadership – here’s how it could change
articles.summary: Apple Vision Pro has been one of the most perplexing Apple product launches in recent history. It’s meant to serve as the beginning of an all new product category for Apple – and more importantly – the next generation of computing. And yet, it feels like a complete afterthought to the company. Under John Ternus, I’m slightly hopeful that we can start to see the product live up to its full potential – though there’s also reason to be skeptical. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple Vision Pro 因領導力不足而受挫 – 以下是如何改變的方式
articles.summary_zh: Apple Vision Pro 是蘋果近年來最令人困惑的產品發佈之一，儘管它應該代表下一代計算技術，但卻感覺像是公司的附帶產品。

articles.title: The next iPad could sport a new naming scheme, thanks to new interview insight
articles.summary: It’s been well over a year since Apple debuted its last entry-level iPad, powered by the A16 chipset. The company will likely release a new version with an A18 chip in the coming months , but there’s a bigger question to be answered – what will they call it? more…
articles.title_zh: 下一代 iPad 可能因新訪談而採用新的命名方案
articles.summary_zh: 蘋果距離上次推出搭載 A16 晶片的入門級 iPad 已超過一年，新款將搭載 A18 晶片，但命名方案仍待確定。

articles.title: Google Wallet adds support for three more digital passport IDs on Android
articles.summary: Following the initial launch in two countries, Google Wallet for Android now supports three more passport IDs. more…
articles.title_zh: Google Wallet 在 Android 上新增三項數位護照 ID 支援
articles.summary_zh: 在兩個國家初步推出後，Google Wallet for Android 現已支援三項額外的護照 ID。

articles.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [April 2026]
articles.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages. more…
articles.title_zh: Google Messages 新功能正在推出【2026年4月】
articles.summary_zh: Google Messages for Android 進行多項功能 A/B 測試，這些新功能最終推出至穩定版需要較長時間。

articles.title: OnePlus Pad 4 in for review
articles.summary: Today, we are taking a look at the new OnePlus Pad 4, the company’s latest premium Android tablet. But first, let’s do a quick unboxing. The OnePlus Pad 4 packaging is very simple, and comes in the familiar red and white colorway. Inside, the tablet itself takes very little of the vertical room, thanks to its slim 5.94mm profile. Most of the height is taken up by the 80W fast charger, along with the matching cable. There’s not much else in the box. The OnePlus Pad 4 is a relatively straightforward iterative update over the OnePlus Pad 3. It replaces the Snapdragon 8...
articles.title_zh: OnePlus Pad 4 測評中
articles.summary_zh: 本文介紹 OnePlus 最新旗艦級 Android 平板電腦 OnePlus Pad 4，包括開箱和簡要評測。

articles.title: Google might be doing away with the Fitbit brand
articles.summary: There is no doubt that Fitbit still has enormous brand recognition. Whether or not the company’s current offerings are your best option is certainly debatable, but the make carries a lot of weight. Well, who better to potentially start killing it off than Google? The company certainly has a dark track record of mishandling brands and products. The situation might not be too bad at the moment, though. We are certainly only piecing clues together, and there is no formal announcement yet. Still, people noticed that on the software side of things, in some markets (mostly European), on the...
articles.title_zh: Google 可能放棄 Fitbit 品牌
articles.summary_zh: 儘管 Fitbit 仍具有巨大品牌認可度，Google 卻可能開始逐步淘汰這個品牌。

articles.title: Google Photos AI Enhance is now live for all users
articles.summary: Google seems to be working hard on expanding its editing options in Google Photos. We recently saw the online titan add a quick facial touch-up feature. Now another similar feature has gone live. It is a very simple and straightforward “AI Enhance” button that sits beside the Enhance and Dynamic buttons that were already present in the Auto tab in the image editor. We tried it for ourselves, and while it can restore highlights and shadows quite effectively and deal with common issues caused by bad lighting and boost colors slightly, it is nothing truly spectacular in any way....
articles.title_zh: Google Photos AI Enhance 功能現已面向所有使用者上線
articles.summary_zh: Google 持續擴展 Google Photos 的編輯選項，新增簡單易用的 AI Enhance 按鈕功能。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro review
articles.summary: Introduction and unboxing Samsung owns Harman, which is the parent company of several high-profile audio brands, many of which make headphones. Yet you will find very few Samsung-branded headphones outside of the Galaxy Buds series. The company hasn’t even released over-ear headphones in years – in short, Samsung is betting that the Galaxy TWS buds are the only headphones that most people need. We have the new Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro in our ears right now – they are the best of the three-tier structure that Samsung settled on (FE, vanilla and Pro). We think these are a notable...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro 評測
articles.summary_zh: 三星 Galaxy Buds 系列是其主要的品牌耳機產品，本文提供 Galaxy Buds4 Pro 的詳細評測。

articles.title: Weekly deals: Galaxy S26 series on discount, Pixel 10 and 10 Pro XL get big price cuts
articles.summary: The Samsung Galaxy S26 series has been on discount since it went on sale in early March. And it looks like there’s no stopping the price cuts. Meanwhile, the recently launched Galaxy A57 and Galaxy A37 are available with free gifts. Notably, a couple of Pixel phones, the OnePlus 15R, and a few Xiaomi devices have also received price cuts on Amazon UK. Samsung’s Galaxy S26, Galaxy S26+, and the Galaxy S26 Ultra are all available with £170 off, plus users are eligible to save another £100 at checkout. Samsung Galaxy S26...
articles.title_zh: 每週優惠：Galaxy S26 系列折扣、Pixel 10 和 10 Pro XL 大幅降價
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy S26 系列自三月初發售以來持續降價，同時新推出的 Galaxy A57 和 A37 提供贈品優惠。

articles.title: This Galaxy S26 series feature is coming to some older Samsung smartphones
articles.summary: Samsung introduced a feature with the Galaxy S26 series, which is coming to some older Galaxy smartphones eligible for One UI 8.5. We are talking about the improved document scanning feature, called Document Scan. Previously, when you clicked multiple pictures of documents, they weren't saved as a single PDF document. Samsung made it possible with Document Scan, which is available to Samsung Galaxy S26 users. Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra Additionally, Samsung also made it easier to access Document Scan by allowing users to add its shortcut to their phone's homescreen. Just open the...
articles.title_zh: Galaxy S26 系列功能將推送至部分舊款 Samsung 手機
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 推出的 Galaxy S26 系列改進文件掃描功能 Document Scan 將推送至符合 One UI 8.5 資格的舊款 Galaxy 手機。

articles.title: Google Pixel 10a vs Google Pixel 9a
articles.summary: We rarely come across two phones that are so similar. The newly launched Google Pixel 10a is unapologetically more or less the same phone as its predecessor, the Pixel 9a. This leaves those looking for an affordable Pixel this year in a quandary. Should you go for the newer model, or should you just save some money and get last year's. And what even are some of these minor differences that separate the two? Well, let's find out. Table of Contents: Design Display Battery Life Charging Speaker Test Performance Cameras Verdict For starters, you can compare...
articles.title_zh: Google Pixel 10a vs Google Pixel 9a
articles.summary_zh: 新推出的 Google Pixel 10a 與其前代機型 Pixel 9a 幾乎相同，這讓尋求平價 Pixel 的消費者面臨選擇困境。

articles.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
articles.summary: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 建立代理商對代理商商務測試市場
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 在最近的實驗中創建了一個分類市場，AI 代理同時代表買家和賣家，進行真實商品和真實金錢的交易。

articles.title: Maine’s governor vetoes data center moratorium
articles.summary: L.D. 307 would have imposed the country’s first statewide moratorium on new data centers — lasting, in this case, until November 1, 2027.
articles.title_zh: 緬因州州長否決數據中心暫停令
articles.summary_zh: LD 307 法案本將實施美國首個全州數據中心新建項目暫停令，有效期至 2027 年 11 月 1 日。

articles.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
articles.summary: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 執行長向 Tumbler Ridge 社區道歉
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 執行長 Sam Altman 在致加拿大 Tumbler Ridge 居民的信中表示，他為公司未能向執法部門通報最近大規模槍擊案嫌疑人感到「深感遺憾」。

articles.title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
articles.summary: Canadian AI startup Cohere is taking over Germany-based Aleph Alpha with support from Lidl’s owner, Schwarz Group. With the blessing of their governments, the companies intend to offer a sovereign alternative to enterprises in an AI landscape dominated by American players.
articles.title_zh: Cohere 與 Aleph Alpha 合併的原因
articles.summary_zh: 加拿大 AI 新創公司 Cohere 將收購德國的 Aleph Alpha，獲得 Lidl 母公司 Schwarz Group 的支持，旨在為企業提供一個主權替代方案，對抗由美國公司主導的 AI 市場。

articles.title: Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026
articles.summary: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these technologies globally.
articles.title_zh: 東京為何是 2026 年最重要的科技目的地
articles.summary_zh: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 擁有四個明確定義的技術領域，各由現場演示、專屬展廳和全球技術建設者及投資者的專題會議支持。

articles.title: Apple under Ternus: what comes next for the tech giant’s hardware strategy
articles.summary: John Ternus, Apple's incoming CEO, is a hardware guy, signaling Apple may be putting devices back at the center of its strategy.
articles.title_zh: Apple 在 Ternus 領導下：科技巨頭硬體策略的未來展望
articles.summary_zh: Apple 的新任執行長 John Ternus 是硬體專家，暗示 Apple 可能將把設備放回其策略的核心位置。

articles.title: Jaeger adopts OpenTelemetry at its core to solve the AI agent observability gap
articles.summary: As software architectures evolve, observability tools must adapt. When the industry moved to microservices, distributed tracing became a necessity. Jaeger emerged as a core tool for engineers to understand those fragmented systems. Now, as organizations integrate generative AI applications and autonomous agents into production, tracing requirements are shifting again. Mapping the execution path of an AI agent involves prompt assembly, vector database retrievals, and multiple external tool calls. “By adopting the Model Context Protocol (MCP), Agent Client Protocol (ACP), and Agent–User Interaction Protocol (AG-UI), the project is building an environment where engineers and AI agents can collaborate.” Jaeger is evolving to address these new workloads. This transition involv
articles.title_zh: Jaeger 在其核心採用 OpenTelemetry 以解決 AI 代理可觀測性缺口
articles.summary_zh: 隨著軟體架構演進，可觀測性工具必須隨之適應。當業界轉向微服務時，分散式追蹤成為必要。Jaeger 作為核心工具幫助工程師理解這些碎片化系統，現在隨著組織整合生成式 AI 應用和自主系統，該工具正在進一步發展。

articles.title: California Engineer Identified in Suspected Shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner
articles.summary: The 31-year-old engineer and self-described indie game developer is suspected of firing shots at the annual event attended by President Donald Trump, high-profile media figures, and US government officials.
articles.title_zh: 加州工程師被指在白宮記者晚宴上開槍
articles.summary_zh: 這位31歲的工程師兼自稱獨立遊戲開發者涉嫌在由川普總統、高知名度媒體人物和美國政府官員參加的年度活動中開槍。

articles.title: Beijing Warns EU After China Firms Included in Russia Sanctions
articles.summary: China said it will take necessary measures after the European Union added Chinese entities to its latest Russia sanctions package, warning that all consequences would be borne by the EU.
articles.title_zh: 中國對歐盟將中國公司納入俄羅斯制裁後發出警告
articles.summary_zh: 歐盟將中國實體添加到最新俄羅斯制裁名單後，中國表示將採取必要措施，並警告歐盟將承擔所有後果。

articles.summary: 在一項最新的研究中，科學家們首次應用氣候代理指標技術（Climate proxy technology）於保存 […]

articles.title: Toyota’s limited edition $3,500 Crown gaming chair has heating, cooling, and a USB-C seatbelt buckle — Toyota Crown front car seat turned into gaming chair, enjoy in-car comforts while on your PC
articles.summary: The world's largest automaker has branched out into computer chairs with a limited edition model as part of The Crown Collection.
articles.title_zh: Toyota限量版$3,500 Crown遊戲椅具有加熱、冷卻和USB-C安全帶扣——Toyota Crown前車座改造成遊戲椅，在PC上享受車內舒適感
articles.summary_zh: 全球最大汽車製造商推出限量版電腦椅，作為The Crown Collection的一部分。

articles.title: Chernobyl virus turned 27 today, and it could brick your PC in ways modern malware can't by overwriting BIOS firmware
articles.summary: 27 years ago today, on April 26, 1999, a 1 KB virus called CIH detonated its payload on hundreds of thousands of Windows 9x machines worldwide.
articles.title_zh: Chernobyl病毒今天滿27歲，它可以通過覆蓋BIOS韌體以現代惡意軟體無法實現的方式毀壞您的PC
articles.summary_zh: 27年前的今天（1999年4月26日），一個1KB的CIH病毒在全球數十萬台Windows 9x機器上引爆。

articles.title: New metal 3D printer shrinks industrial tech down to workbench size with laser powder bed fusion system — aims to bring laser metal printing to workshops and labs for $9,600
articles.summary: Scrap Labs has unveiled the Scrap 1, a compact laser powder bed fusion metal 3D printer that fits on a workbench and starts at $9,600 — a fraction of what industrial LPBF systems typically cost
articles.title_zh: 新型金屬3D列印機通過laser powder bed fusion系統將工業技術縮小到工作台尺寸——目標是以$9,600將雷射金屬列印帶到工作室和實驗室
articles.summary_zh: Scrap Labs推出了Scrap 1，一款小巧的laser powder bed fusion金屬3D列印機，可放在工作台上，售價$9,600，僅為工業LPBF系統成本的一小部分。

articles.title: AMD Ryzen 5 7600X3D review: An unbeatable value gaming CPU
articles.summary: The Ryzen 7 9850X3D was never set up for success, but our testing reveals the ugly side of AMD’s latest X3D CPU: higher power consumption for minuscule performance gains.
articles.title_zh: AMD Ryzen 5 7600X3D評測：無與倫比的價值遊戲CPU
articles.summary_zh: Ryzen 7 9850X3D本不被看好，但測試揭示了AMD最新X3D CPU的缺陷：功耗更高但性能提升微乎其微。

articles.title: Disabled gamer prototypes true one-handed keyboard-and-mouse controller, device nominated for award — maker inspired to build device after losing right arm in an accident
articles.summary: A Redditor who lost their right arm in an accident decided to prototype and build their own single-handed controller to get back into gaming. This peripheral combines a mouse and keypad into a single ergonomic device for one-handed use of PCs and consoles.
articles.title_zh: 身障玩家原型化真正的單手鍵盤滑鼠控制器，裝置獲提名獎項——製造者因在事故中失去右臂而受啟發製造該裝置
articles.summary_zh: 一位在事故中失去右臂的Reddit用戶自行製造單手控制器以重返遊戲，該外設將滑鼠和鍵盤墊合併為一個符合人體工學的裝置，可用於PC和主機的單手操作。

articles.title: Commodore backs down over FPGA firmware lockdown — it won’t now try and block third-party firmware installs but will stand firm against bricked modded units
articles.summary: Iconic home computer brand has reversed its no-third-party firmware decision but makes it clear that users will get 'no free support/replacement for bricked modded units.'
articles.title_zh: Commodore放棄FPGA韌體鎖定——不會試圖阻止第三方韌體安裝但將堅決反對被改造毀壞的設備
articles.summary_zh: 標誌性家用電腦品牌撤銷了禁止第三方韌體的決定，但明確表示用戶將對「被改造毀壞的設備不獲免費支援/更換」。

articles.title: DeepSeek launches 1.6 trillion parameter V4 on Huawei chips as U.S. escalates AI theft accusations — U.S. gov't alleges IP theft by DeepSeek and other Chinese AI firms
articles.summary: DeepSeek on Friday released a preview of its V4 large language model, the Hangzhou-based startup's most powerful to date.
articles.title_zh: DeepSeek在華為晶片上推出1.6兆參數V4，美國升級AI盜竊指控——美國政府指控DeepSeek和其他中國AI公司竊取智慧財產權
articles.summary_zh: 杭州新創公司DeepSeek週五發佈了其最強大的大型語言模型V4的預覽版。

articles.title: Taiwan's stock market surpasses the UK's despite having less than a quarter of the UK's economy — AI boom propels Taiwan forward, TSMC alone accounts for more than 40% of Taiwan's total market value
articles.summary: Taiwan's stock market is now worth more than the United Kingdom's, in a shift driven almost entirely by the insatiable global appetite for AI chips.
articles.title_zh: 台灣股市超越英國，儘管經濟規模不到英國四分之一——AI熱潮推動台灣前進，TSMC單獨佔台灣總市值超過40%
articles.summary_zh: 台灣股市市值現已超越英國，這一轉變幾乎完全由全球對AI晶片的渴望推動。

articles.title: Intel reportedly says it boosted yields by selling what would normally be 'scrap' or 'low-expectation' CPUs — customers more willing to accept lesser chips due to overwhelming CPU demand
articles.summary: Intel’s Investor relations team confirmed that customers are sweeping up the lower-quality chips, bringing in tangible revenue for the company.
articles.title_zh: Intel據報稱通過銷售通常會是「廢品」或「低期望」CPU來提高產量——由於CPU需求旺盛，客戶更願意接受較低品質晶片
articles.summary_zh: Intel投資者關係團隊確認客戶正在掃貨低品質晶片，為公司帶來實實在在的收入。

articles.title: Enthusiast builds 3D-printed retro PC case and shares the files so you can print it yourself — design fits ITX mobo and ATX PSU, comes with front 3.5-inch bay for USB ports
articles.summary: You finish building this 3D-printed retro PC case in under 100 hours as long as you have all the right tools and materials. u/Potatozeng even included a PDF guide (with pictures!) to help you through the process.
articles.title_zh: 愛好者製造3D列印復古PC機箱並分享檔案供您列印——設計適配ITX主機板和ATX電源供應器，配有用於USB連接埠的前置3.5英寸光碟機
articles.summary_zh: 您只需100小時內即可完成此3D列印復古PC機箱的製造（若您擁有所有工具和材料）。u/Potatozeng甚至提供了PDF指南（含圖片！）來協助您完成過程。

articles.title: Turtle Beach's new mouse has a 2.25-inch touchscreen and hotswap batteries that last 15 hours apiece — 'MC7' costs $160, part of company's new Command Series peripheral lineup
articles.summary: Turtle Beach's new Command Series of peripherals features a lot of screens, and the most interesting implementation is seen in the MC7 mouse. The 2.25-inch LCD rests where your thumb will, while providing macros or glanceable information like your PC stats. The mouse otherwise has cutting-edge specs and will be available in July.
articles.title_zh: Turtle Beach新滑鼠搭載2.25英寸觸控螢幕和可快速更換電池，續航力達15小時——'MC7'售價$160，為公司新推Command Series周邊裝置系列的一部分
articles.summary_zh: Turtle Beach新推的Command Series周邊裝置系列配備多個螢幕，最有趣的應用在MC7滑鼠中實現。2.25英寸LCD螢幕位於您拇指所在位置，提供巨集或PC統計資訊等一目瞭然的資訊，滑鼠還配有尖端規格。

articles.title: Mobile SMS blasters in vehicles prowled Canadian streets, causing 13 million network disruptions and infiltrating tens of thousands of devices — blaster blocked 911 calls, stole cellphone data
articles.summary: The authorities say that the three individuals used the SMS blasters to send thousands of smishing messages.
articles.title_zh: 車輛中的行動SMS轟炸機在加拿大街道上蔓延，造成1,300萬次網路中斷並滲透數萬台裝置——轟炸機阻止911電話並竊取手機數據
articles.summary_zh: 當局表示三名個人使用SMS轟炸機發送了數千條釣魚簡訊。

articles.title: DARPA calls for proposals for autonomous underwater drones — gov't looking for a small, cheap autonomous sub that can be developed and built quickly
articles.summary: DARPA is looking for proposals for cheap undersea drones that can be quickly built and deployed nearly anywhere.
articles.title_zh: DARPA徵求自主水下無人機提案——政府正在尋求可快速開發和製造的小型廉價自主潛水艇
articles.summary_zh: DARPA正在徵求可快速製造和幾乎在任何地方部署的廉價海底無人機提案。

articles.title: Google’s new gradient icons for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and other apps are radical redesigns
articles.summary: So far, five Google icons have undergone gradient updates. 9to5Google can now report on a complete gradient redesign for Gmail and other Google Workspace apps. more…
articles.title_zh: Google’s new gradient icons for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and other apps are radical redesigns
articles.summary_zh: So far, five Google icons have undergone gradient updates. 9to5Google can now report on a complete gradient redesign for Gmail and other Google Workspace apps. more…

articles.title: I thought I wanted colorful Android phones until I dropped mine
articles.summary: For a while, color options for flagship phones felt stale. The top iPhones and Android phones always seemed to be limited to neutral colors and muted pastels. If you wanted something bright or bold, you were out of luck. Now, the tide seems to be turning . We have a bright orange iPhone 17 Pro , a deep purple Samsung Galaxy S26 , a rich blue Galaxy Z Fold 7 , and a pastel green Google Pixel 10 Pro . These fresh color palettes offer something new in a world with too much black, white, gray, and silver. After buying numerous personal phones with traditionally boring colors, like my white titanium iPhone 16 Pro or my titanium silver Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge , I thought I wanted a change. Then, I tested review units of Samsung’s boldest blue and purple colorways. These devices looked pristine o

articles.title: Vivo’s 17x optical zoom lens let me take photos my Pixel could never capture
articles.summary: Credit: Hadlee Simons / Android Authority Vivo made a splash in the smartphone photography space last year with the vivo X200 Ultra , as it offered an optional telephoto extender. This external lens, attached to the 200MP periscope camera, enabled native 200mm or ~8.7x zoom . The company has since brought this same lens to the globally available X300 Pro. Now, vivo has launched the X300 Ultra, and it maintains an optional 8.7x lens. However, the manufacturer has also launched an even larger telephoto extender that enables a crazy 400mm or ~17x zoom.
articles.title_zh: Vivo’s 17x optical zoom lens let me take photos my Pixel could never capture

articles.title: I use two phones with Android Auto — here’s how I easily switch between them
articles.summary: If you’re struggling with connection issues on Android Auto , you’ll already know how difficult it is to keep one phone connected, let alone two. I share my car with my fiancée, and we both use Android Auto on our respective devices: her Galaxy S10 Plus and my Galaxy S24 FE. But when it comes time for one of us to drive the car and the other’s phone connects instead of the driver’s, it can be a little annoying.
articles.title_zh: I use two phones with Android Auto — here’s how I easily switch between them
articles.summary_zh: If you’re struggling with connection issues on Android Auto , you’ll already know how difficult it is to keep one phone connected, let alone two. But when it comes time for one of us to drive the car and the other’s phone connects instead of the driver’s, it can be a little annoying.

articles.title: I was ready to dismiss Gemini’s new Notebooks. After using the feature, I can’t live without it
articles.summary: While I’ve long wanted to organize my Gemini chats and files into projects, when the feature arrived as Gemini Notebooks , I initially felt disappointed. However, after playing around with the feature using both Gemini and NotebookLM, it’s more useful than I expected.
articles.title_zh: I was ready to dismiss Gemini’s new Notebooks. After using the feature, I can’t live without it
articles.summary_zh: While I’ve long wanted to organize my Gemini chats and files into projects, when the feature arrived as Gemini Notebooks , I initially felt disappointed. However, after playing around with the feature using both Gemini and NotebookLM, it’s more useful than I expected.

articles.title: I’ve used Pixel Weather for 2 years — here’s why I’m ditching it for Gradient Weather
articles.summary: Ever since it debuted on the Pixel 9 series in 2024, Google’s Pixel Weather app has been my go-to weather application. I love its simplistic and Pixel-y UI, the customizable home screen, the excellent pollen tracker, and more. For what I want in a weather app, Pixel Weather checks just about every box. Recently, though, I’ve been using another app instead. I stumbled across Gradient Weather while scrolling through Threads a little over a week ago, and almost immediately after downloading it, I knew I had found something special.
articles.title_zh: I’ve used Pixel Weather for 2 years — here’s why I’m ditching it for Gradient Weather

articles.title: You shouldn’t trust Android’s AirTag alternatives before Google fixes these 5 issues
articles.summary: Credit: Rita El Khoury / Android Authority Google’s Find Hub network and AirTag alternative trackers have been out for nearly two years now, and a lot has happened in this time. What started as a weak network with many bugs, inconsistencies, and unreliability issues is now a more solid, widespread, and reliable way to find your trackers — as well as your phone, buds, or smartwatch — nearly anywhere in the world. However, Google’s network and trackers are still lagging behind the competition from Apple, Samsung, and Tile in a few key areas. I’ve been testing and comparing these trackers long enough that all of their shortcomings have become very clear. Here are six areas where Google should focus its efforts to make its network and trackers the best out there, and the most trustworthy.
articles.title_zh: You shouldn’t trust Android’s AirTag alternatives before Google fixes these 5 issues
articles.summary_zh: Credit: Rita El Khoury / Android Authority Google’s Find Hub network and AirTag alternative trackers have been out for nearly two years now, and a lot has happened in this time. However, Google’s network and trackers are still lagging behind the competition from Apple, Samsung, and Tile in a few key areas. I’ve been testing and comparing these trackers long enough that all of their shortcomings have become very clear. Here are six areas where Google should focus its efforts to make its network and trackers the best out there, and the most trustworthy.

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A56 receive April 2026 security patch
articles.summary: Samsung has released the April 2026 security patch for two more smartphones - the Galaxy A37 and the Galaxy A56. The April 2026 security patch addresses 47 security issues, and it's rolled out for the Galaxy A37 with a software update having firmware version A376BXXS2AZC2, while the Galaxy A56 receives the security patch with an update having firmware version A566BXXSABZD2. Samsung Galaxy A37 The software update for both smartphones is currently seeding only in Europe, but the rollout should expand to other regions soon. If you live in Europe and haven't received the security...

articles.title: Weekly deals: the Samsung Galaxy S26 series is on sale, iPad Air 11" and 13" (M3) get discounts
articles.summary: The Samsung Galaxy S26 series started off with strong pre-orders in late March and held its prices for a while, but now the flagship trio has settled at a new normal. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is by far the most popular model of the three, in part due to having the unique Privacy Display, but also because of the inherent advantage of the Ultra model. Earlier this week, we published an S26 Ultra vs. S26+ comparison article. We have also compared the new Ultra with the S25 Ultra and pitted it against the iPhone 17 Pro Max. ...

articles.summary: Poco knows its audience – that’s what we get from last week’s poll. For this year’s X series, the company added a new class, the Pro Max, and it completely overshadowed the regular Pro. Poco X8 Pro and X8 Pro Max at a glance The Poco X8 Pro Max is going to be a hit – the budding flagship killer got an overwhelmingly positive response in our poll. It got knocked for its camera – people still remember the 108MP shooter on the X5 Pro – and for still featuring a USB 2.0 port. But this applies to the Pro as well. articles.title: How to find and unlock the data hidden within videos
articles.summary: Video is everywhere in today’s world, and more video content is being pumped out than ever before. It is estimated that more than 500 hours of footage are uploaded to YouTube every minute.  Businesses and organizations are starting to see the value in being able to search the rich data available in video content. From detecting products for e-commerce discovery to tapping into the large volumes of high-quality information found in conference recordings and university lectures, or searching through site-surveying footage, Video Management Systems are becoming valuable assets for surfacing information locked in video files. Instead of having to ignore video footage or look for it separately, wouldn’t it be nice if it could be retrieved alongside your other relevant documents
articles.title_zh: 如何尋找和解鎖影片中隱藏的資料
articles.summary_zh: 視頻在當今世界無處不在，內容產出量創新高，每分鐘有超過500小時的影片上傳到YouTube。企業和組織開始認識到搜尋和分析豐富影片資料的價值。

articles.title: The debugging wars: Cursor 3 takes aim at Claude Code’s agentic edge
articles.summary: The Cursor we’ve come to know and love has always been an IDE with AI assistance . Working with Cursor gave a similar look and feel to working with IDEs of days gone by ( VS Code , JetBrains, etc). On April 2, 2026 Cursor 3 launched with its dedicated Agents Window . The Agents Window is a standalone interface where the user can describe a task to an agent and the agent should be able to execute the task completely. Sound familiar?  Cursor’s new Agent Window looks almost identical to Claude Code (Anthropic’s terminal-based coding agent) and other AI chatbot interfaces. This didn’t happen by accident. In my opinion, this was done as a direct response to Anthropic  (Claude Code) shipping code interfaces that do what Cursor does without the middleware layer.
articles.title_zh: 除錯戰爭：Cursor 3 對標 Claude Code 的智能體優勢
articles.summary_zh: Cursor 一直是提供 AI 協助的 IDE，提供類似 VS Code 和 JetBrains 等傳統 IDE 的體驗。2026年4月2日，Cursor 3 推出專有的 Agents Window，這是一項重大功能創新。

articles.title: Musk Vies to Turn X Into Super App With Banking Tool Near Launch

articles.summary_zh: 在收購 Twitter 逾三年後，Elon Musk 表示即將實現他的長期目標，推出新的金融服務工具，並承諾在本月向公眾開放。

articles.title: China Formalizes Labor Rules for Gig Workers on Online Platforms
articles.summary: China formalized its first comprehensive policy framework for “new employment groups,” including delivery riders and livestreamers, signaling a shift from ad-hoc regulation to normalization of the platform economy.
articles.title_zh: 中國制定網路平台零工勞動規則
articles.summary_zh: 中國制定了首個關於「新就業形態」的綜合政策框架，涵蓋外賣騎手和直播主等，標誌著從臨時監管向平台經濟常態化的轉變。

articles.title: DeepSeek V4 Delay Shows Shift to China Chips, CCTV Account Says

articles.title_zh: DeepSeek V4 延遲反映向中國晶片轉變，央視帳號表示
articles.summary_zh: 據政府控制的中央電視台附屬社群媒體帳號透露，DeepSeek V4 模型的延遲發佈反映了該公司戰略性地更深入整合中國國內晶片生態系統的轉向。

articles.title: New robotic control software avoids jamming their joints
articles.summary: Switching from one smartphone to another is mostly a smooth procedure. You log into your accounts and your apps, preferences, and contacts should sync to the new hardware. But in the world of robotics, swapping an old robotic arm for a newer model has meant setting everything up from scratch. To fix that, a team of researchers at the Swiss École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne (EPFL) has developed what they call Kinematic Intelligence, a framework that makes switching robots work more like switching smartphones. They describe their system in a recent Science Robotics paper. Demonstrating skills For years, roboticists have been working on getting robots to learn from demonstration—teaching them new skills by showing them what to do, rather than writing lines of code. The idea is to remot
articles.title_zh: 新機器人控制軟體避免關節卡頓

articles.title: 從「零信任網路」到「雙零安全」
articles.summary:
如今，「零信任網路」已經成為市場上的流行詞，幾乎所有安全廠商都將自己的產品與它連結在一起。但「雙零安全」更進一步，強調安全性和生產力的同時提高。
「雙零安全」是指安全產品對一般使用者來說零感受，對設備、工具機來說零影響。
這種方法旨在提供無縫且易於使用的安全體驗，確保安全措施不會影響生產力或設備和機器的性能。實施這種不會破壞使用者體驗或設備效能的強大安全解決方案，可以讓組織認識到資訊安全不是障礙，是企業平穩、安全營運的推動者。
著名安全先驅Bruce Schneier在他的部落格中寫道：
articles.title_zh: 從「零信任網路」到「雙零安全」
